subject: JUST OUT: President Trump’s bold vision for Middle East peace
body:
Today, President Trump introduced the most realistic and detailed plan yet for peace between Israel and the Palestinians. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04b7a63b2b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 28, 2020
---
| | |
# **JUST OUT: President Trump’s bold vision for Middle East peace**

**Today, President Trump introduced** the most realistic and detailed plan ever presented for peace between Israel and the Palestinians.

**WATCH:** [“We must break free of yesterday's failed approaches.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a57ba82894&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Peace to Prosperity”** is a fundamentally different vision for one of the world’s most complex problems. “My vision presents a win-win opportunity for both sides,” President Trump said today, with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu standing alongside him.

**President Trump also took** the step of meeting yesterday with Israel’s opposition leader, Lt. General Benny Gantz. In doing so, the President secured agreement from both major Israeli figures on the Peace to Prosperity Vision. “Peace transcends politics by any measure,” President Trump said today.

**Now, for the first time** in this conflict, President Trump has reached an understanding with Israel’s leadership [on a map](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=787ae8759d&e=3ee4985eea)[ with real borders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d5825928d&e=3ee4985eea) for a proposed two-state solution.

**Palestinians and Israelis** both deserve a future of peace and prosperity. A realistic compromise will protect Israel’s security, fulfill the aspirations of self-determination for the Palestinians, and ensure universal and respectful access to the holy sites of Jerusalem.

**President Trump’s Vision** designates defensible borders for Israel and does not ask it to compromise on the safety of its people. For Palestinians, the Vision delivers significant territorial expansion, allocating land roughly comparable in size to the West Bank and Gaza for establishing a Palestinian State. Transportation links would allow for efficient movement between Gaza and the West Bank, as well as throughout Palestine.

**“All humanity** should be able to enjoy the glories of the Holy Land. This part of the world is forever connected to the human soul and the human spirit,” President Trump said. “These ancient lands should not be symbols of conflict, but eternal symbols of peace.”

[Click here to see President’s Trump’s full plan! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a6d3ddab6&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** **More** : [A two-state solution that keeps Israel secure](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05e6dfe0ea&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| ****
---
|
# **WATCH: Dems and impeachment, 1998 vs. now**

**President Trump’s legal team** wrapped up its case against House Democrats’ dangerous and weak Articles of Impeachment today, telling senators they should leave the right of choosing a President to the American people.

**“What they are asking** you to do is to throw out a successful president on the eve of an election with no basis and in violation of the Constitution,” White House Counsel Pat Cipollone said. “It would . . . weaken, weaken forever all of our democratic institutions.”

**WATCH** : [Democrats in their own words, circa 1998](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0aff971946&e=3ee4985eea)

**The first partisan impeachment** in U.S. history came with a lot of bluster and distractions from Democrats and the media. Here are the 10 things that really matter:
* Democrats aren’t just trying to remove President Trump from office—they want to **_remove him from the ballot_**. Their Articles of Impeachment would bar him from holding “any Office of honor, trust, or profit under the United States.”

* Investigating **_corruption in Ukraine_** , including potential conflicts of interest involving Hunter Biden and Burisma, is not “baseless,” as Democrats claim. Even the Obama State Department had concerns. [So did ABC News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b0fe2ae7d&e=3ee4985eea) and others.

* House Democrats’ [sham investigation](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd93adb023&e=3ee4985eea) was unauthorized and unconstitutional. A President defending his due-process rights is called **_separation of powers,_** not “Obstruction of Congress.”

* For Democrats, impeachment was always **_a goal in search of an excuse_**. Once the [Russia collusion hoax](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d97b44f43&e=3ee4985eea) failed, they found another excuse within months.

* Speaker Nancy Pelosi called impeachment a matter of “urgent” national security. Then she followed the [fastest impeachment](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bea5f9e297&e=3ee4985eea) in history **_with the longest delay_**.

* Under House Democrats’ **_new bar for impeachment_** , at least [20 former Presidents](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab9b47e74b&e=3ee4985eea) would’ve been removed from office, including George Washington.

* Rep. Adam Schiff wants the Senate to do the House’s job for it and investigate. The House **_didn’t even bother to subpoena_** witnesses such as former National Security Adviser John Bolton that they now claim are crucial to hear.

* Even Democrats’ own called witnesses testified that President Trump’s policy of lethal defense **_aid toward Ukraine is stronger_** than under President Obama.

* The do-nothing Democrats keep putting politics first and the American people second. But **_[President Trump is working hard](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c3368c031&e=3ee4985eea)_** and keeping his promises.

* You don’t need to listen to secondhand sources: You can **_[read the transcript](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=961234ec86&e=3ee4985eea)!_**

**“All you need** in this case is the Constitution and your common sense,” Cipollone says.
---
| ****
---
|
# **Photo of the Day **

Official White House photo by Shealah Craighead

**President Trump joins Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to unveil the Trump Administration's Middle East peace plan** | January 28, 2020
---
|

We've come a long way, and it's all because of you.

We're so grateful for all the time you've spent to be a part of this movement -- whether it's chipping in a few dollars here and there, talking to your friends and family about big, structural change, or knocking on doors to talk to voters, you've been there every step of the way.

Friday marks the final FEC deadline before Iowa, and Elizabeth is counting on this grassroots movement to not miss our fundraising goals. **We need your help to be in the strongest position possible.**

**[Will you chip in $25 or more today and bring our campaign one step closer to our January fundraising goal? To commemorate this special moment, we'll send you a limited-edition enamel pin as a thank you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a158/45c30650/1e7b37991/66e079a8/3502213340/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndhcnJlbi1waW4tbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zQUZfRU9NX1BJTl9RXzIwMjAwMTI4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/warren-pin-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3AF_EOM_PIN_Q_20200128_V1S1_P")**

subject: Will you help me defeat my Big Oil backed opponent?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
We launched our Defeat Senator Daines Fund for two reasons: to flip Montana blue and give Democrats the majority in the Senate. | | | Hifolks, We launched our **_Defeat Senator Daines Fund_** for two reasons: to flip Montana blue and give Democrats the majority in the Senate. **[Will you help me get another 390 donations before Friday to help kick my Big Oil backed opponent out of the U.S. Senate?](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=65088cd7bfbe4fa19a61b2681579f1cd&_e=xBHmcYTzwe7FFDldUvnp0yDhV8O7qq-jthUgwXOU50WGvYfL5ku5dj_FvY-oJuhLKvUljINI2M9vG6ggUegLRayan6I9BrjAXUIoG_-D8gMBYsdnbKUbsrVnNvSP8AAuegpE7BiuYlZquOdKWjcTPED4FuPDftrMrHazqEzDWnzZJQLirUx0xX7OngwxSthOAJIIYmG_gJI7zBR7UIiLkZIEXJxy-ki6qvJq0-yDmjBq6QTk0gHOgegRPToa8QXHgCyLKcl-V64L4_KlbJa5bblHHQgq6ueeDqqMsZsdMVP0t0aRh4xgoeU3GLaoJNNSAs4mw-BnFxMZGMNd6Cx9MuNK9CfVHAVtftyeBN9tk-6bm-YZ8m0sPNlHBO9isMPTdn8TwVBNBAPgQ0Bi7sj4i8SkJP9OoW7hxlL5TMsBlabHYsjZXELVUz8P0iSIRy1CLsTruyoH4IzMfPz3RE9x50Rz7qTbF2UjNHPlqAaqDypc0GR44M2BlFKDBa88hlJJ)** If everyone reading this says “someone else will step up for him”, we’ll definitely fall short of Friday’s goal and take two steps backward toward flipping the Senate. I hope I can count on your support, Wilmot

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. [CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=65088cd7bfbe4fa19a61b2681579f1cd&_e=xBHmcYTzwe7FFDldUvnp0yDhV8O7qq-jthUgwXOU50WGvYfL5ku5dj_FvY-oJuhLKvUljINI2M9vG6ggUegLRayan6I9BrjAXUIoG_-D8gMBYsdnbKUbsrVnNvSP8AAuegpE7BiuYlZquOdKWjcTPED4FuPDftrMrHazqEzDWnzZJQLirUx0xX7OngwxSthOAJIIYmG_gJI7zBR7UIiLkZIEXJxy-ki6qvJq0-yDmjBq6QTk0gHOgegRPToa8QXHgCyLKcl-V64L4_KlbJa5baRdyMsPhFv9PqUa4fR5ko2dJsv02w3TIpDVLyAqkUFKBDaeX7h6scvf2-nCqg1XHbtJfyE9JaRT3xr-cs70xWohbCzixDbyXu2rovXaxb-zUlzUvYJgxv4tdwcGieQL0DUwMK-1ijLBAaRJYhLWDoKtNFfPQdEFjcUunLY7O8LhpPn1st8bP4WQxwB26JGg6BflnMeCJr3UYKkYnWqwrVWa4gWNbsaT0qF8FVJ4YJIbspiiYNYk8uAI_XMGLsVY8g%3D%3D)

name: Cornyn Alert
subject: marching in lockstep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texans deserve a senator who will serve them, not his bosses in D.C.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904b2/7f51f7bc/4d46e943/4ef06386/458896472/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **Sen. Cornyn marches in lockstep with Mitch McConnell.
[Help us elect a leader who will fight for _us_ >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904b2/7f51f7bc/4d46e943/4ef06385/458896472/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200128.3nd__825__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904b2/7f51f7bc/4d46e943/4ef06385/458896472/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200128.3nd__825__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

* **First** , Sen. Cornyn voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act **eighteen times**. _Politico_ even dubbed him health care repeal's "top salesman."
* **Then** , Sen. Cornyn helped push hyper-partisan judges like Brett Kavanaugh to lifetime appointments on the Supreme Court.
* **And then** , he stood by his D.C. bosses and violated his constitutional duty by **"vow[ing] not to pay attention to impeachment."**

**[Texans deserve a senator who will serve _them_ , not his bosses in D.C.
Pitch in now to help elect MJ Hegar and defeat Senator Cornyn >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904b2/7f51f7bc/4d46e943/4ef06385/458896472/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200128.3nd__825__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904b2/7f51f7bc/4d46e943/4ef06385/458896472/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200128.3nd__825__&amount=10&recurring=true")

\-- Team MJ

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Ken Starr and entire Trump team have no rebuttal to the impeachment charges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump's defense team spent only two hours on Saturday presenting their defense team. And now, they've brought in Ken Starr and Alan Dershowitz to attack the prosecution in a last ditch attempt to distract the American people from the facts of the case. According to Adam Schiff, "That's what you do \-- and as a prosecutor I've seen it time and time again \-- when your client is guilty." This strategy isn't working, though. 72% of Americans think the Senate should hear from new witnesses. Additionally, 48.5% of Americans support removing Trump from office. Are you one of these voters? **Do you support removing Trump from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde54/6e9863e8/8214c5f/1db06fa3/910712841/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Hw2TysaS") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde54/6e9863e8/8214c5f/1db06fa3/910712841/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Hw2TysaS") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. subject: An urgent request for you to make a contribution with our campaign on the rise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6556%2E377263%2ENV0X4V) Yang Gang --

We’re going to be extremely blunt here -- we’re writing to ask you to make your first contribution tonight.

Make no mistake: We have a big opportunity here to win this nomination by surprising the establishment and media in the early states with our finish.

**A new poll from Morning Consult of all early states (IA, NH, NV, SC) has us at 8%. Our highest ever in their polling -- surging 3 points in the last week.**

We are peaking at the right time, and no one is going to see us coming.

But we could absolutely lose every ounce of our momentum if we fall short of this goal before our FEC deadline Friday night. Every dollar of our goal is necessary to continue rising in Iowa, New Hampshire, and beyond.

Since you’ve been holding back, we’re coming to you now when it’s most urgent:

[Can we count on you to contribute $10 or more tonight toward our $3 million FEC deadline goal? name: Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
A little while ago, I heard about a man in New Hampshire who'd just lost his job but still donated $2 to our campaign. I don't take that lightly and I don't want anyone to make a donation... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a153/45c30650/1e7aa5f52/66e06347/444588463/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
A little while ago, I heard about a man in New Hampshire who'd just lost his job but still donated $2 to our campaign.

I don't take that lightly and I don't want anyone to make a donation that doesn't fit in their budget. So I want you to know that every single contribution means a great deal to me and, more importantly, to our movement. I owe something to you and every grassroots donor: a promise that I'll fight just as hard as you do.

That man knew that his $2 donation would matter, and it does. He knew that his contribution would help level the playing field for families across the country, and it will.

He knew that he was joining the fight alongside millions of people he'd never meet, because we pick up each other's fights as our own.

I'm grateful down to my toes that he's in this fight -- and that you're in this fight, too. It means the world to me, and every single donation brings us closer to big, structural change.

**When I'm president, we'll have a government that listens to -- and works for -- people who reach deep into their pockets to chip in $2 at a time, not just those who can donate $2,000 without blinking an eye.**

**[We're going to do this -- together. If it makes sense for you to make a contribution right now, will you help keep up the fight by chipping in $2 before our fundraising deadline on Friday?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a153/45c30650/1e7aa5f52/66e06346/444588463/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zM0ZfRUdSX1NSWV9FXzIwMjAwMTI4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN33F_EGR_SRY_E_20200128_V1S1_P")**

>
The way I see it, getting involved in a political campaign is an act of optimism.

Joining the fight means that we can make things better than they are now. That we all have a role to play, whether it's chipping in a few bucks or knocking on doors for a few hours (or both!).

It's about hope -- hope for the America that we can build together, $2 at a time.

An America where Washington is focused like a laser on creating good-paying jobs for hard-working Americans, not padding the profits of giant multinational corporations.

Where people get the care they need if they get sick, and no one goes broke because of medical bills.

Where people can decide to have more kids without worrying that the cost of child care will crush them.

Where anyone who wants to follow their dream and hit the books can get a degree from a technical school, community college, or public university at no cost.

**2020 is our moment to dream big, fight hard, and win. Starting in 2021, we'll have a government that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.**

**[If that's the future you want to build, make a contribution before our Friday fundraising deadline, and let's keep fighting side by side to make the big, structural change we need.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a153/45c30650/1e7aa5f52/66e06346/444588463/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zM0ZfRUdSX1NSWV9FXzIwMjAwMTI4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN33F_EGR_SRY_E_20200128_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Stand with me and support Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate
body:
why I'm proud to endorse Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate... Peter,Bill Hagerty has been a strong supporter of my dad, serving as Tennessee Victory Chair, as a senior leader on the Trump transition team, and as Ambassador to Japan.Bill is the type of conservative fighter we need in Washington to _Drain the Swamp_ and _Keep America Great_. That's why I'm proud to endorse Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate!Will you join me in supporting Bill by [**making a donation right now?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-y/) I joined Bill in Tennessee for one of his campaign events and the energy in the state is incredible. Tennesseans are ready to re-elect President Trump and send Bill Hagerty to the U.S. Senate!In this race, Bill will square off against one of Chuck Schumer's handpicked liberal candidates. We can't afford to let Schumer and these radical Democrats win in Tennessee and flip the Senate.[**Can you support Bill right now?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-j/) Thank you for your time. Donald Trump Jr. [DONATE NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-t/) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njuiuht-akrkktjik-o/)

clean_body: why I'm proud to endorse Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate... Peter,Bill Hagerty has been a strong supporter of my dad, serving as Tennessee Victory Chair, as a senior leader on the Trump transition team, and as Ambassador to Japan.Bill is the type of conservative fighter we need in Washington to Drain the Swamp and Keep America Great. That's why I'm proud to endorse Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate!Will you join me in supporting Bill by I joined Bill in Tennessee for one of his campaign events and the energy in the state is incredible. Tennesseans are ready to re-elect President Trump and send Bill Hagerty to the U.S. Senate!In this race, Bill will square off against one of Chuck Schumer's handpicked liberal candidates. We can't afford to let Schumer and these radical Democrats win in Tennessee and flip the Senate. Thank you for your time. Donald Trump Jr. | | | | ---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty 4515 Harding Pike Suite 110 Nashville, TN 37205 |

body:
Team -- I hope you saw the email below yesterday from DCCC Chairwoman Cheri Bustos. I am proud that our grassroots campaign and my record of reform and holding powerful people accountable is being recognized.
Team -- I hope you saw the email below yesterday from DCCC Chairwoman Cheri Bustos. I am proud that our grassroots campaign and my record of reform and holding powerful people accountable is being recognized. Numerous news outlets have already rated our race as one of the most competitive in the country, and now we’re part of this highly competitive Red to Blue Program!

I’m about to step into a meeting with my Finance Director, Nolan, to go over our monthly fundraising numbers. **Can you make a quick donation to our campaign to help us reach our goal and keep up the momentum?**

You can use this secure link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eugener2b?refcode=RedToBlue**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14410655/151076078/64003216?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.29_b1_ei_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzc2OWEwOC1hNzQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2cb5v8eLhtmamAzSQmc7OpBTPsuKVQ8aE7on7TCGjQ=)

Thanks again for all of your help getting us to this moment in our campaign. We truly couldn’t do it without you!

\--Eugene

_Sent from my iPhone_

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Cheri Bustos, DCCC Chairwoman**
Date: Tue, Jan 28, 2020 at 10:00 AM
Subject: Raising the stakes [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14410656/151076079/64003216?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.29_b1_ei_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzc2OWEwOC1hNzQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2cb5v8eLhtmamAzSQmc7OpBTPsuKVQ8aE7on7TCGjQ=) Team,

One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairwoman of the DCCC is meeting with the incredible challenger candidates from across the country. These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I’m honored to be working with them.

I’ve gotten to know Eugene DePasquale well, and I can confidently say that he is exactly the type of leader that PA-10 deserves to have fighting for them in Washington. **That’s why I’m so proud to announce that we’ve named him to our highly competitive Red to Blue program.**

Eugene is primed to tackle the tough task of flipping this seat from red to blue, but he needs your help to do it.

[**Will you make a $10 grassroots contribution right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14410657/151076080/-2071845119?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.29_b1_ei_all&amount=10&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzc2OWEwOC1hNzQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2cb5v8eLhtmamAzSQmc7OpBTPsuKVQ8aE7on7TCGjQ=)

**Now that we’ve raised the stakes by placing Eugene’s campaign at the center of our offensive battlefield, Washington special interests will stop at nothing to defeat him -- including spending huge sums of money on misleading attack ads.**

Eugene is running a true people-powered campaign, so he is relying on support from folks like you to win big on Election Day and restore real leadership to their communities. [**That’s why it’s so important for you to pitch in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14410658/151076081/-2071845119?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.29_b1_ei_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzc2OWEwOC1hNzQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2cb5v8eLhtmamAzSQmc7OpBTPsuKVQ8aE7on7TCGjQ=)

Thank you for everything,

Cheri Bustos

Peter,

**We are just three days away from the end of the month and we have donors who are excited to match all donations up to $5,000!**

Our race is really heating up. We are 34 days until Election Day and early voting begins in just three short weeks. Our team has been working hard. We have been knocking on doors and getting our message directly to voters — and that hard work is paying off. We have won just about every endorsement in the race, but we are still a little low on funds to complete our campaign plan.

**[We can double your donation if you chip in by midnight this Friday night. Donate before our big deadline!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14411251/151079464/533471126?refcode=em012920&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYyNjU3MS1hODQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2l0eu9RQfp5DfI98rcwa6CYuvY5D1sYCNTbePzEwYEw=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14411252/151079465/533471126?refcode=em012920&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYyNjU3MS1hODQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2l0eu9RQfp5DfI98rcwa6CYuvY5D1sYCNTbePzEwYEw=)
We don’t take corporate PAC money — we rely on you. I know that we can win this race with support from folks like you. Our campaign has brought in more than 6,000 contributions from over 2,000 people like you and me. We are also running a powerful, grassroots campaign that is knocking on more doors, writing more postcards, and making more calls than our opponents. clean_body: Peter, We are just three days away from the end of the month and we have donors who are excited to match all donations up to $5,000! Our race is really heating up. We are 34 days until Election Day and early voting begins in just three short weeks. Our team has been working hard. We have been knocking on doors and getting our message directly to voters — and that hard work is paying off. We have won just about every endorsement in the race, but we are still a little low on funds to complete our campaign plan. = = We don’t take corporate PAC money — we rely on you. I know that we can win this race with support from folks like you. Our campaign has brought in more than 6,000 contributions from over 2,000 people like you and me. We are also running a powerful, grassroots campaign that is knocking on more doors, writing more postcards, and making more calls than our opponents. We had nearly 200 people turn out to our big organizing rally this month. = = = = = = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Mary Mancini
subject: time flies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Wow, January went by fast! November will be here before we know it, and while getting Democrats elected is our primary focus – we also have to make sure we are raising enough money to fund those efforts. We rely on grassroots donors like you to hit our fundraising goals and right now we’re $5,600 away from hitting January’s – and the clock runs out Friday at midnight. Can you help us reach our goal before it’s too late? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/ZXVWahn2kkW0qqTOPR902Q2]
Every election is important, but 2020 has incredibly high stakes. November will give Americans the opportunity to choose whether or not we are ok with Trump’s behavior. Whether or not we are ok with a President who withholds military aide for personal gain. Whether or not we are ok with a Senate that ignores constitutional duties when they get in the way of partisan agendas. Whether or not we are ok with a GOP that is fueled by hate speech, racism and sexism.
The TNDP is using all of our resources to support and elevate candidates that share our vision of a Tennessee and America that work for all of us. In order to do that we need every ounce of support you can give us. Please consider making a donation right now and help us fight for a better future.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZXVWahn2kkW0qqTOPR902Q2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZXVWahn2kkW0qqTOPR902Q2]
Thank you,

--
Mary Mancini

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: 54 cents. 58 cents. 62 cents. 79 cents. 90 cents.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14413324/151099265/664205141?refcode=em012920-header&refcode2=a1a29a12-af42-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWEyOWExMi1hZjQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGS9V3E5Tb3UbanIQYRKXB12G_QMK4uN9TQZGNz8Zr4=) **** | | Friend,

Eleven years ago today, President Obama signed the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act into law, but the **gender pay gap persists.**

Today, Black women earn just 62 cents for every dollar paid to white, non-Hispanic men. Latinas earn 54 cents. For Native American women, it’s 58 cents. White women make 79 cents, and Asian-American women earn 90 cents on the dollar.

This is unjust and it’s holding our country, our economy, and our families back.

**But the gender pay gap will continue to persist until we insist on pay equity, raise the minimum wage to $15, establish access to paid family and medical leave, and make childcare both affordable and accessible.**

**[I’ve spent my career standing up to bullies and fighting to advance opportunities for women and working families. I’m asking you to donate ahead of our first major fundraising deadline of the 2020 cycle so we can take this fight for equal pay to the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14413325/151099266/664205141?refcode=em012920-1-a&noskip=true&refcode2=a1a29a12-af42-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWEyOWExMi1hZjQyLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGS9V3E5Tb3UbanIQYRKXB12G_QMK4uN9TQZGNz8Zr4=)** | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friend, Eleven years ago today, President Obama signed the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act into law, but the gender pay gap persists. Today, Black women earn just 62 cents for every dollar paid to white, non-Hispanic men. Latinas earn 54 cents. For Native American women, it’s 58 cents. White women make 79 cents, and Asian-American women earn 90 cents on the dollar. This is unjust and it’s holding our country, our economy, and our families back. But the gender pay gap will continue to persist until we insist on pay equity, raise the minimum wage to $15, establish access to paid family and medical leave, and make childcare both affordable and accessible. = | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = Yours truly, Teresa ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: I'm officially sounding the alarm.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scalise For Congress
body:
Elise Stefanik emailed you. Jim Jordan emailed you. Bob Gibbs emailed you. Steve Scalise emailed you. Ann Wagner emailed you. Now, I am emailing you. We're 72 hours away from a critical FEC deadline. We need 1,392 more Patriots to help us defend the President and win back the Majority.
Elise Stefanik emailed you.
Jim Jordan emailed you.
Bob Gibbs emailed you.
Steve Scalise emailed you.
Ann Wagner emailed you.
Now, I am emailing you.
We're 72 hours away from a critical FEC deadline. We need 972 more Patriots to help us defend the President and win back the Majority.
**The Republican Whip has just authorized 5x-matching until midnight tonight:**
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54226432:WHVG_hvwN:m:1:1155937413:29C6ED53F511A64D184B1FA3CEF42F6A:r)

The President's defense team is doing an excellent job standing up for the President. But Democrats are utterly ruthless in their manipulation and deception. To make it worse, they are raising hundreds of millions of dollars to destroy us.
That's why I want you to understand how important hitting this FEC goal is, and we only have 72 hours left.
_So what are you going to do? I need to know what your plans are!_
[**Will you stand with President Trump and help us hit our goal to win?**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54226432:WHVG_hvwN:m:1:1155937413:29C6ED53F511A64D184B1FA3CEF42F6A:r)
I know you won't give up on us now!
To victory,
Newt Gingrich

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: Gag rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Last week was the 47th anniversary of Roe v. Wade -- a pivotal moment in history. At the same time, it marked three years of Trump's destructive global gag rule -- which bars international non-profit
|
---

| | Last week was the 47th anniversary of Roe v. Wade -- a pivotal moment in history. **At the same time, it marked three years of Trump 's destructive global gag rule -- which bars international non-profit organizations from counseling patients on critical reproductive healthcare decisions overseas if they accept any global public health assistance from the United States. ** This policy, championed by my opponent since 1984, has had a devastating impact on the ability of women, girls, and LGBTQ+ persons to receive adequate healthcare around the world -- even for non-reproductive related issues. We can't let this continue, we have to elect more pro-choice and pro-human rights voices to Congress and vote out representatives like Chris Smith who -- at every turn -- are actively working against our health and our rights. [**Help send me to Congress to fight for a pro-human rights, pro-women 's rights agenda next year, by chipping in right now to our movement >> **](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ec/522d4087/7aff35d9/4f34115c/1172056492/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=SMD_20200129_gagrule_em_fr_all_L1") Thank you, Stephanie | **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ec/522d4087/7aff35d9/4f34115b/1172056492/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=SMD_20200129_gagrule_em_fr_all_ftr")**
---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ec/522d4087/7aff35d9/4f34115a/1172056492/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Our New Ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Today our campaign released our second television advertisement titled “Cartels”, about my support for securing America’s border and destroying the cartels who flood America with drugs and engage in human trafficking.

Securing our borders is a matter of national security. The Mexican drug cartels are guilty of infringing on our national sovereignty by smuggling illegal drugs and people across our border. They are terrorists. If I’m elected, I’ll work with President Trump to build the wall, ban sanctuary cities and stop amnesty.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0503fe85dc5947a4987066e000713feb&_e=uBP2Z3xzwQ8EgT2S4ryJR2IRsY07w3HSjTjZEfw5_Z7zJ1joATLMGglzd6jnmlQGKfssRUturN-3X_2aITWbGIAh6vcqERB2NlanXqCDuin5VgaoxgV9Cc30r0sDXickFWzhwSjAQKBIeSrSLertGfwH62YcTuU93ud32e80FFoOYZ7vtvWQ2PEVew8WAlgR2HNnMWozD3XXAXhkF-cP1QebEK_ZGccSXNIH8SCrkRKbDtDgs0ydbi7bp6tOmzONr0tZ_iREiGXLQN4_tR87Av2k4WuO-YF2o2Rmy1710m2nu5LCO1cYmUJ7ird7wlM5)
[Click here to watch the ad!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0503fe85dc5947a4987066e000713feb&_e=uBP2Z3xzwQ8EgT2S4ryJR2IRsY07w3HSjTjZEfw5_Z7zJ1joATLMGglzd6jnmlQGKfssRUturN-3X_2aITWbGIAh6vcqERB2NlanXqCDuik1YUB_G5snj3kRdgiB7yaE4DzSkR0YZ9Kd0hh44a0USmNnFrDcEJDHsDUAZC6jvBrpVz3PjkhoABBUh7Rvx6vvO1qcd4goRtc-K0-_b8ocOBMYuxfJBWb7q0P0q6253WzUsL8ipQb2Yn84zZNGCCph_aWQ57UsEbAHxSvyhS9iSU7wGp72m3PpD25UI3ozKhoBKzIMsG8C0CJo2K0sLQch)

Our campaign has already knocked on over 50,000 doors, raised more than $1,300,00 and gained the support of conservative leaders here in Houston such as Senator Ted Cruz, former Congressman Ted Poe and Harris County Commissioners Jack Cagle and Steve Radack. **None of this would have been possible without supporters like you.**

Lizzie Fletcher has voted with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time. That doesn't reflect the 7th District that you and I know. With your continued help and support, I'm confident we'll be able to flip this district and bring back conservative representation to Congress.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

clean_body: Friend, Today our campaign released our second television advertisement titled “Cartels”, about my support for securing America’s border and destroying the cartels who flood America with drugs and engage in human trafficking. Securing our borders is a matter of national security. The Mexican drug cartels are guilty of infringing on our national sovereignty by smuggling illegal drugs and people across our border. They are terrorists. If I’m elected, I’ll work with President Trump to build the wall, ban sanctuary cities and stop amnesty. Our campaign has already knocked on over 50,000 doors, raised more than $1,300,00 and gained the support of conservative leaders here in Houston such as Senator Ted Cruz, former Congressman Ted Poe and Harris County Commissioners Jack Cagle and Steve Radack. None of this would have been possible without supporters like you. Lizzie Fletcher has voted with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time. That doesn't reflect the 7th District that you and I know. With your continued help and support, I'm confident we'll be able to flip this district and bring back conservative representation to Congress. Sincerely, Wesley Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Protecting Our Neighbors.
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZUqoujNEx-g&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ddcc6495a4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_24_04_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ddcc6495a4-32267927

Protecting our neighbors
Good morning Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to share the incredible story of Pleasantville, a historic area in east Houston made of primary Black and Latino residents. Due to lack of protections provided by the state and government, the residents of Pleasantville have suffered a history of elevated health risks and damaging industrial catastrophes, exposing people to higher rates of cancer and poor air quality.

In response to their environmental struggles, the people of Pleasantville have created Achieving Community Tasks Successfully, or ACTS, (https://www.houstonchronicle.com/news/houston-texas/houston/article/Pleasantville-air-quality-community-TSU-toxins-14954543.php?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ddcc6495a4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_24_04_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ddcc6495a4-32267927) which allows the neighborhood to monitor the air quality of its area themselves. With this tool, Pleasantville can more effectively hold their local government accountable for the poor living conditions they have left their residents in. While it is incredible that the community of Pleasantville has come together to fight for their environmental and human rights, it is sad that this one-of-a-kind initiative has spurred out of incompetency by the local government.

As your next member of Congress, I will ensure that communities like Pleasantville are no longer neglected and that all Texas residents get the environmental rights they deserve. I will work with and support organizations and national agencies like the EPA to protect neighborhoods like Pleasantville from the environmental harms of industry.

Help me look out for our neighbors suffering from environmental harm. Vote Marc Flores for District 18.
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ddcc6495a4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_24_04_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ddcc6495a4-32267927
Our News Page (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/news/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ddcc6495a4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_24_04_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ddcc6495a4-32267927)
Due to our recent appearance in various news sources, we have added a news page to our website. Check out (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/news/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ddcc6495a4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_24_04_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ddcc6495a4-32267927) the articles we've appeared in, and stay tuned for our press releases for updates regarding our campaign.
Please be sure to donate to our campaign today so that we can keep going strong!
Donate $5 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ddcc6495a4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_24_04_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ddcc6495a4-32267927)
Thank you for your support,

Marc

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Here’s why the Swamp is afraid of our campaign
body:
I'll fight for you in Washington | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=795c6d9796&u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bcb44ab89f)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6079eb6b6b&e=795c6d9796)
---
|
---
| | Peter,
The Swamp has taken hundreds of conservative reformers over the years and broken them down into members of the establishment.

Here's why I don't think they could do that to me.

When I was State Superintendent of Schools I had to face down several powerful special interests to fight for our kids. I defended parents’ right to homeschool their children against liberal Democrats’ attempts to limit their freedoms, something that wasn't easy to do politically at the time.

I did it anyway, because I knew it was the right thing to do for our kids and grandkids. I've said from the beginning that I'm running for the next generation. So whether it's a party leader, big lobbyist, or any other special interest, know that I'll be going to Washington every week to do one thing.

I'll be going to fight for Less Washington--More Oklahoma.

[**If you support our campaign and think we should send a conservative with a record of standing up to special interests to Washington, please consider donating $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to our campaign to take back Oklahoma's 5th district.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e5a37f1b90&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=0f06f9e111&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| This isn't just another congressional race. This is one of the most important elections for taking back the House in the entire country.

**National Journal says this is the nation's #1 battleground district.**

And because of its high profile, the Democrats are going to fight hard as we conservatives try to flip it RED again. According to the Associated Press, Oklahoma's 5th district is "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020."

It's going to be a tough campaign, and the Democrats and their allies in the media are going to fight dirty to defend Oklahoma's 5th.

But we can fight back with your support.

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=20f8793065&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please co ntribute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us take back the House for conservatives, fight the Swamp, and represent your Oklahoma values in Washington.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bf2f0d5f0a&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=18b718ad81&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Adam Schiff: "It requires moral courage to stand up to this President."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Adam Schiff: "If the truth doesn't matter, we're lost. "Framers couldn't protect us from ourselves, if right and truth don't matter. "And you know that what he did was not right. You know, that's what they do in the old country, that Colonel Vindman's father came from. Or the old country that my great grandfather came from, or the old countries that your ancestors came from, or maybe you came from. But here, right is supposed to matter. It's what's made us the greatest nation on earth. No constitution can protect us if right doesn't matter anymore. "And you know you can't trust this president to do what's right for this country. You can trust he will do what's right for Donald Trump. "He'll do it now. He's done it before. He'll do it for the next several months. "He'll do it in the election if he's allowed to. "This is why, if you find him guilty, you must find that he should be removed. Because right matters. Because right matters, and the truth matters. Otherwise, we are lost." **Should Trump be removed from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde50/6e9863e8/8223bc8/1db06fa5/3308910561/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Fx1gLGxA") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde50/6e9863e8/8223bc8/1db06fa5/3308910561/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Fx1gLGxA") Thank you for your response, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde50/6e9863e8/8223bc8/1db06fa5/3308910561/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Fx1gLGxA")

name: Yang2020 HQ
subject: Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Building a multi-state organization costs money

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9) Yang Gang --

As we speak, we have staff across all four early states and are planning our next steps for Super Tuesday.

**But our fundraising has slowed, and we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $3 million by midnight on January 31st to ensure our budget can grow with these plans.

[If we miss this goal, we will have to cut back. Can you step up with a donation of $10 or more to help us expand our organization in the early states and beyond? We only have until Friday at midnight to hit this goal. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=5&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9)

---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=11&amount=25&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9)
---
The Yang Gang has already done so much to get us to this point. And it speaks to the strength of our movement that we’ve been able to build such a successful organization so quickly.

Now it’s time to finish the job. Help us build and maintain our organization in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada so we can win and build the momentum needed to take this thing all the way to the White House.

**Chip in here:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/momentum](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=12)**

Thank you,

Yang2020 HQ
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23890?t=13&akid=6563%2E377263%2Ee0F7L9)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I don't want to lose my teammate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If I lose my teammate Mark in November, Virginians will lose one of their strongest champions in Washington.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a85d/1009784169/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
Derek,

I'm proud to serve as a United States Senator from Virginia alongside my good friend, Mark Warner. I might be biased, but I think we make a great team because Mark is just as fired up as I am about delivering results for all Virginians.

To be honest with you, **if I lose my teammate Mark in November, Virginians will lose one of their strongest champions in Washington.**

Why am I concerned? Donald Trump's reelection campaign is pouring money into Virginia, and Mark already faces multiple Republican challengers for his seat in the Senate.

**[Will you help me keep the team together? Your contribution today will help Mark reach his first 2020 goal.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a85d/1009784169/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a85c/1009784169/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?express_lane=true&refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a85b/1009784169/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?express_lane=true&refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a85a/1009784169/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?express_lane=true&refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a859/1009784169/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?express_lane=true&refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a858/1009784169/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?express_lane=true&refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a847/1009784169/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
Mark is committed to protecting health care for Virginians with pre-existing conditions, safeguarding our elections from foreign interference, and building our economy. He's already done so much for us, and I'm going to have his back this year, just like he had mine in 2018.

Even though we're barely a month into 2020, I've already seen two unnerving developments here in the Commonwealth that concern me:
* **First** , the Trump Victory Initiative is training volunteers and holding events all across the Commonwealth -- over 82 events in 2019 alone.
* **Second** , a poll of presidential battleground states showed several scenarios where **Donald Trump actually flips Virginia red.** We know Trump is paying attention -- he recently tweeted "Republicans will win Virginia in 2020."

But it's January 2020, not November 2020. **We still have time to prevent Trump 's tweet from becoming reality.** That starts with keeping this team together so Mark and I can continue fighting for you in the Senate.

**[Join me-- help Mark start 2020 off strong by hitting his $15,000 end-of-month goal.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a85d/1009784169/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")**

Thanks, Derek.

-- Tim Kaine

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d674/53d9897e/534269c5/1c89a846/1009784169/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2events?refcode=20200129_f_1_nd__445__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Bennet for America
subject: Democrats are worried about a Bernie nomination. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| [Team, you may have seen headlines like this recently:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab1b/134673f2/8748a4e/69975255/3566611530/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab1b/134673f2/8748a4e/69975255/3566611530/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
If you're worried too, _you should be._

As more polls are released, it's clear: if we don't act immediately - we really could be faced with a Sanders nomination.

[We can't let this election just become bickering over $55 TRILLION worth of empty promises and policies we can't pass.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab1b/134673f2/8748a4e/69975255/3566611530/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We have to ignite our base, win back the places we lost in 2016 -- and most importantly -- nominate a candidate who can actually defeat Donald Trump and win down ballot races. Bernie is not that candidate.

That's why Michael is running. He's the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and knows how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

[Our end-of-month deadline is Friday, and the first primary votes are just days away. We've got to pump up our fundraising if we're going to have a fighting chance against Bernie. Will you rush a donation today and join the fight, friend? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab1b/134673f2/8748a4e/69975255/3566611530/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: MJ Hegar Campaign HQ
subject: it’s time to unlock the match! 🔐
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This Friday is our LAST end-of-month deadline before voting starts in the Texas primary!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904be/7f51f7bc/4d5b38f5/4ef063fc/1398800555/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
We're approaching a huge milestone, Peter:

**This Friday is** the LAST end-of-month deadline before voting starts in the Texas primary! That means we need to knock our fundraising goal out of the park to give MJ the resources she needs to win.

**Here 's the good news: If 2,000 grassroots supporters pitch in now, all donations before Friday's deadline will be MATCHED! [Will you rush a contribution right now to help us unlock the match and win in the nation's biggest battleground state?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904be/7f51f7bc/4d5b38f5/4ef063f3/1398800555/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlock?refcode=email_20200129.1nd__828__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904be/7f51f7bc/4d5b38f5/4ef063f3/1398800555/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlock?refcode=email_20200129.1nd__828__&amount=10&recurring=true")
Your donations have helped MJ travel nearly 15,000 miles and speak with thousands of Texans so far. **But there are still a ton of undecided voters out there** and not a lot of time left before they hit the polls!

**So Peter, can we count on you to be one of the 2,000 donors we need to help us UNLOCK THE MATCH before Friday 's deadline? **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Fitzpatrick
subject: We are only a few dollars away from reaching our goal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Subject: We fell short

We have some bad news. We fell short of our daily goal yesterday, which means we're already pacing behind to meet our goal of $3.5 million by the FEC deadline on Friday.

This is our most ambitious goal yet, but we know we can get there -- if we can turn things around today.

**It's incredibly important that we hit our last fundraising goal before Iowa. These milestones are how we set budgets for advertising, organizing, outreach, and more.**

[**We're pacing behind where we needed to be and we're counting on grassroots donors chipping in for the first time to power this movement. Can you make a contribution of $2 or whatever you can to help get our campaign back on track to hitting this important fundraising goal before the FEC deadline?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a290/45c30650/1e771bbdd/66e012e4/1425569362/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zRUZfRU9NX0tJQ19UXzIwMjAwMTI5X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3EF_EOM_KIC_T_20200129_V1S2_P")

body:
I wanted to give you a quick update. We are less than 3 days away from our End of Month fundraising deadline and we’re still $67,509 short of our goal.To unsubscribe click here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Hey Peter,

I wanted to give you a quick update. We are less than 3 days away from our End of Month fundraising deadline and we’re still $67,509 short of our goal.

All eyes are on Susan and it’s absolutely critical Susan hits this mark. Coming up short will give her opponents fodder that she’s behind the pace and struggling. We can’t let that happen.

If you could stand with Susan and our team by making a donation of $10 or more right now it would make a huge difference. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

I hope we can count on you before it’s too late.

Sincerely,

Amy
Finance Director
Team Collins
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Collins
Date: Thursday, January 23, 2020
Subject: Emergency
To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com >

Peter,

Susan has and continues to be a voice of reason that we can ALWAYS count on. But right now, she needs to know if she can count on us.

As we type this, Democrats are ramping up their efforts to see Susan defeated. Millions of outside dollars are being poured into Maine to slander her name and completely vilify Susan. We need your help to fight back.

As of a few minutes ago we were still $135,000 short of our January goal.

Will you make an EMERGENCY donation to help us get there? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Democrats have been angling to turn all of the Northeast Blue, and quite frankly they’ve done a great job. Right now Susan Collins is the only federally elected Republican in New England.... And they have their sights set on taking Susan down.

Your support http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 will provide the resources we need to spread the truth about Susan to every Maine voter, and ensure Susan has the funds needed to fight back against these false attacks and win next November.

The road ahead is going to be difficult. But our future is worth fighting for which is exactly what Susan is doing. If you agree that we cannot afford to lose Susan’s voice, we hope you’ll stand with our team today. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

- Team Collins

P.S. Coming up short of our fundraising goals is simply not an option. If that happens the Democrats will take that as a sign of weakness and it won’t be good.

Please help us make our January goals by making an emergency donation right now! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDE2NTM0NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjY2NTM0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: an ambitious goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Our first end-of-month deadline of 2020 is in just two days.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de4d/693b8b0a/43585148/72de49d3/1713641263/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Our first end-of-month deadline of 2020 is in just two days. This will be the first test of our people-powered movement this year.
**We want to send a powerful message about our grassroots strength with this deadline. So we 've set a goal for another 1,000 donations by Friday.**
This is our most ambitious goal yet, and we're going to need a lot of people to step up if we're going to reach it. So we're asking:
[**Will you make a donation -- of any amount -- to our campaign right now? Whatever you can give will go a long way for our campaign and help us continue building our movement before the primary.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de4d/693b8b0a/43585148/72de49d2/1713641263/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjktYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200129-a")
Ed knows that the only way we can win this race and pass our progressive agenda is by building a grassroots army. That is how we build power and create change for the working people of this country.
That's why our goal right now is focused on the number of donations. The number of people chipping in here matters just as much as the amount we raise.
If you've been waiting to make your first donation to Ed's campaign, there's never been a better time. What do you say?
[**If you are able to, please consider chipping in whatever you can afford today. Each donation sends a message that you are in this fight with us. Ed cannot do this alone.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de4d/693b8b0a/43585148/72de49d2/1713641263/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjktYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200129-a")
Thank you in advance for adding your donation and putting us one step closer to our goal.
\- Team Markey
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de4d/693b8b0a/43585148/72de49d2/1713641263/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjktYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200129-a")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de4d/693b8b0a/43585148/72de49d0/1713641263/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

name: Sara 2020
subject: MSNBC's Chuck Todd sent a reporter to Maine to find out what voters were saying about Susan Collins. Here's what they heard:
body:
They're ready for a Senator they can trust.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802eea/4bef7a87/6a9bda63/287fb753/321932662/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends --
MSNBC's Chuck Todd sent a reporter to Maine to find out what voters are saying about Susan Collins. Here's what they heard:
_" I think Susan tries to, you know, play both sides and appease everybody too much."_
_" She's following her typical course of wavering all the time... Would I stand by her? No."_
_" She will lose my vote when she runs again."_
Susan Collins' net approval rating has plummeted -- **she 's down 51 points since 2017!**
**It 's clear that Mainers are ready to elect a Senator they can trust -- and our campaign is going to be the one to give it to them.**
**[Will you help us do it by making a $3 contribution to support our campaign today?](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802eea/4bef7a87/6a9bda63/287fb752/321932662/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200129-1-full")**
Remember, we're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so our ability to defeat Susan Collins will come down to you.
All our best,
Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802eea/4bef7a87/6a9bda63/287fb752/321932662/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200129-1-full")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: They're ready for a Senator they can trust. "" Friends -- MSNBC's Chuck Todd sent a reporter to Maine to find out what voters are saying about Susan Collins. Here's what they heard: " I think Susan tries to, you know, play both sides and appease everybody too much." " She's following her typical course of wavering all the time... Would I stand by her? No." " She will lose my vote when she runs again." Susan Collins' net approval rating has plummeted -- she 's down 51 points since 2017! It 's clear that Mainers are ready to elect a Senator they can trust -- and our campaign is going to be the one to give it to them. "" Remember, we're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so our ability to defeat Susan Collins will come down to you. All our best, Team Sara ******** ""****** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Sen. Chuck Grassley: Skeptics Are Eating Crow on Trump Trade Deals
body:
Skeptics of President Trump’s bold way of negotiating trade ate some crow this month. "That includes this Iowa senator.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8dd14efd8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sen. Chuck Grassley: Skeptics Are Eating Crow on Trump Trade Deals**

“Skeptics of President Donald Trump’s bold way of negotiating trade ate a bit of crow this month. That includes this Iowa senator,” Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) writes in the _Des Moines Register_.

“I’m not a big fan of tariffs. So, when the president imposed tariffs as leverage in world trade talks, I was skeptical. And yet, here we are starting the fourth year of his presidency and President Trump has succeeded in securing two major trade agreements that are good for America and good for Iowa.”

President Trump is signing the new U.S.–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA), which replaces the outdated NAFTA, at the White House today.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c38f4bb30f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “White House lawyers gave their Democratic foes a dose of their own medicine at President Trump’s impeachment trial Tuesday — by playing old video clips in which New York pols such as Rep. Jerry Nadler and Sen. Chuck Schumer railed against embarking on the extraordinary measure when it’s politically polarizing.” White House Counsel Pat Cipollone told them, “You were right,” Kate Sheehy reports for the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12e73c3da9&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “President Trump just offered the most realistic plan in decades for an Israeli-Palestinian settlement. It won’t work magic overnight, but it shifts the conversation in the right direction. A long string of US presidents tried to solve all the problems of the Middle East by pushing Israel to sacrifice its security and even its identity as a Jewish state,” the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=88cafc0d81&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “In their latest impeachment effort, Democrats argue that their case is ‘overwhelming’ and that their facts are ‘uncontested.’ Yet, Democrats are demanding additional witnesses.” They can’t have it both ways, Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes in _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=61135198be&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “CNN is arousing the ire of conservatives for a segment in which a network host and two political pundits giggle as they make fun of the alleged ignorance of Donald Trump and his voters. The odd exchange obscures how little the CNN guys know about the story they’re supposed to be covering,” James Freeman writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fdd5b755f&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e5dbedbff&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=813951e47a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=749e091545)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Chris Putnam
subject: It's getting heated
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
| Read to learn more
---
Friend, With less than 34 days until the Texas Primary, the political establishment is starting to get nervous. Within the past few weeks, we have rolled out the endorsements of conservative icon Sheriff Bill Waybourn, Texas Right to Life, Club for Growth, and many others. More and more people are beginning to realize **Kay Granger has become a stranger to the people of Texas and no longer represents our values in Congress.** Granger's office has had the highest turnover for any member of Congress in the past year, and she has only been seen at TWO public events in the past month. **Meanwhile, I 've attended 24.** Kay Granger can feel this race heating up and is too afraid to even accept our open invitation to join me at a set of town hall events before our primary election. **It has become more clear than ever, the status quo is no longer good enough for Texas and we need to elect a conservative outsider for Congress. I 'm running to be the change we need in Washington, [but I need your help. ](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/Cr84NE1uNhH6g1X7pGe3Rw/ePboLDiEE8BQpeg892gSLzDQ)** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/FDqxAPwFilQAX4uaTlfGAw/ePboLDiEE8BQpeg892gSLzDQ) With the Texas Primary fast approaching, I need all the help I can get to keep our momentum strong and replace Kay Granger with a true conservative. [**Can I count on you to chip in $25 or more today? **](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/Cr84NE1uNhH6g1X7pGe3Rw/ePboLDiEE8BQpeg892gSLzDQ) You have been such a steady supporter of my campaign in the past and I'm hoping we can receive your support today. Onward, \- Chris
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/dZqm9obaScLAG4TN9iNYHA/ePboLDiEE8BQpeg892gSLzDQ) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/763vHEOrAKZctIAA763WWZ0p5g/ePboLDiEE8BQpeg892gSLzDQ)

name: TIffany Shedd
subject: crunch time 🚨🚨🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:

I just checked in with my finance team ahead of our first monthly deadline of the year and I have some bad news...

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200129-eom12?refcode=em200129-eom12&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Hi there, I just checked in with my finance team ahead of our first monthly deadline of the year and I have some bad news...

We are less than 72 hours away from closing the books and not on pace to hit our online fundraising target.

I'm a little worried because our race is a top target for Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their billionaire buddies who will spend whatever it takes to defeat me.

If our campaign doesn't kick this election year off with the strongest numbers possible, then I'm afraid Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think we're vulnerable.

That's why it's so important we hit this first goal before January ends -- which means we need a surge of grassroots contributions in the next 72 hours from folks like you. So, I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to donate toward our first end-of-month goal of 2020 and help us get back on track? name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mitch McConnell's about to throw a Hail Mary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Republicans in the impeachment trial have just about tried everything to distract Americans from the charges against Trump and block new witnesses from testifying. According to _The Wall Street Journal_ , Mitch McConnell was forced to admit to his caucus that he didn't have the votes to block Democrats from calling witnesses. Mitch McConnell is used to using his power in the Senate to block anything he pleases. He stopped President Obama's Supreme Court nomination, Merrick Garland, from even having a single hearing. He has sat on over 250 pieces of progressive legislation, including legislation mandating background checks supported by 90% of Americans. He'll do anything to protect his grasp on power. We have less than a day to voice overwhelming public support for more witnesses like John Bolton and new evidence. If you believe we can't allow Mitch to get away with his sham trial rules, we need you to make your voice heard.
