name: Amber Davis
subject: Chip Roy's name-calling gets the Texan in me riled up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
And I'm not alone...
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk59-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk59-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Friend,
When my mom first told me she was running for Congress, I knew it would be a tough race. (So tough, in fact, that POLITICO is calling it one of the biggest House battles in the country.)
But when my mom's opponent, Chip Roy, tried to reduce her accomplishments by referring to her as nothing more than a "national abortion celebrity," I have to say - that kind of name-calling got the Texan in me pretty riled up.
My mom has always fought for people struggling to be heard. She has always, _always_ stuck up for women and families - whether it meant standing on the floor of the Texas Senate for 13-hours to fight for reproductive freedoms, or filibustering a $5.4 billion cut to Texas schools or just standing up for our family. And it's never been about "celebrity" for my mom. It's been about providing a voice for people who need a fighter in their corner.
Do you know what that makes her to me, friend? A role model - for my sister, for my young daughters and for millions of women across the country. And luckily, I'm not alone: **A fired-up group of donors just offered to MATCH ALL GIFTS to help my mom defeat Chip Roy, flip this House seat blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House of Representatives.**
But we're counting on friends like you to help us unlock the full potential of this match and get us to our $10,000 goal - and we've only got until midnight on Jan. 31 to make it happen. So let's go:
**[Donate $3 right now- every dollar will be MATCHED - to flip TX-21 from red to blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk59-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
I really appreciate everything you've done to support my mom. I know she does, too. Mostly, we're grateful for all you are doing to create a better world for my daughters and yours. Thank you.
Amber

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ac7/704929dc/1618c044/3993806d/2177943753/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ac7/704929dc/1618c044/3993806c/2177943753/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ac7/704929dc/1618c044/3993806f/2177943753/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Are you still with me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://links

It’s been a busy month. We have entered into double digits counting down to the primary election, and we have also stood and watched this last month Peter, It’s been a busy month.

It's clear that Pro-Trump Republicans will go to any lengths to aid and abet the President in covering up his crimes. [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1db3990550bb4cf9abd678453fb11592&_e=t_SpeIQxfqUSAAwrEzNZul8tao6_FtSny-aObJjZ4DA4x_mln62AtruRtfXqxHQJwsnkWDhukJdsqZOVAFXC2VRReUsRqHE3EGPOSaomtrVh8WhRiCbZ6feKjzgBvtNTfecGt0-nvNAPHFlsyO0JPmEoy0qKbCvY7johLA500J136VvqjgilK0VCHelIWtDbhkHXwdKz-c5uVaM-c2af6Rd6TZeeDPcSDNrcfiWqxhpYbPPzHqHvs3Y9w_tvndVngtt0FwJJBVtEErax-_7ORQ%3D%3D) I want to make sure you have a chance to read my latest Op-Ed, where I discuss a major hole in Democrats' impeachment argument. [ CLICK HERE FOR FULL ARTICLE ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1db3990550bb4cf9abd678453fb11592&_e=t_SpeIQxfqUSAAwrEzNZuq2IycWIuNZYN-1NmKjaM6f_Xf4jFlfCBYTvjzSd9K5F8HqZRLDQAzpkZYeP7L9A3Bvxy6TlR89cVbf9cf6b_qVmgvJ6OvaO554h86VdWXjS1yBWX7lnY95lnFO9gBPIz5FBbV1T3KCyDWdae-02V2K4DlVO2q2I1kIbEnFtZZs05Zugmlza6swlZNzPh0pg79L9CWKDHKluyBuz2meo2fgnfw_gd49Bl7bjmwbL1s-YVm7zudrytLIwd-R7mMFIAgHbEJ9vOGMXaN6seNxIWoeZELKHV72EtUhI7seJViM4WDrwu_3onv5wjuYa8-Ck0eomut1ZZYBNU0F-WuGO2BUCcX03SpfcapM6vu8OfBM1P9JEq7J_5HNYKG6TE13Lvw%3D%3D) If Democrats actually believe Trump is a danger to democracy, they will act accordingly and put aside petty partisan goals for the good of the country. ...if Democrats truly believed their own rhetoric about the menace Trump poses to civilized society, wouldn’t it be their patriotic duty to do everything possible — even work with Republicans — to beat him? Instead, Democrats seemingly do not really believe Trump to be that dangerous or cannot resist the temptation to use this opportunity to force far-leftism on the American people. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=1db3990550bb4cf9abd678453fb11592&_t=qWtsPgFTluk95GI09rlO3p_20A1B68Kr31nfYrARGL7TtraQsByUxxz3BnWeX1uK5aCqbQLzRjNhVMogJYcux6tJBVJqq3qwbbLOjjlqXkxuV6bCrpMfubQb8HZBa9OxmchF9yqokI4VbxRVr6tJoxsywZkoU3BgQfjdtNhMlV4%3D)

If Democrats actually believe Trump is a danger to democracy, they will act accordingly and put aside petty partisan goals for the good of the country. ...if Democrats truly believed their own rhetoric about the menace Trump poses to civilized society, wouldn’t it be their patriotic duty to do everything possible — even work with Republicans — to beat him? name: Unite the Country
subject: why do you support Joe Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
One of our goals at Unite the Country is to mobilize Joe Biden's supporters to help get the word out on social media about how Joe will work to unite the country and restore integrity to the White House.

With less than one week away from the Iowa Caucuses, we're hoping you can help in a big way! We're gathering videos from supporters about why they support Joe and what his candidacy means.

[**Can we count on your help? It 's easy: just a few clicks to share why you think Joe Biden is the best candidate for president.**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76df/287b9173/2b05d1af/7e766c3d/399063399/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/page/content/video")

**[SHARE YOUR STORY](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76df/287b9173/2b05d1af/7e766c3d/399063399/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/page/content/video")**
Whether it is Joe's record as a strong, steady leader, his fight to protect and expand Obamacare, or his plan to end violence against women, there are plenty of reasons to back Joe. Your video can talk about any of these issues or more -- it's all about whatever motivates YOU to support Joe Biden.
[**Will you take a few moments to record a short video sharing why you are supporting Joe for president?**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76df/287b9173/2b05d1af/7e766c3d/399063399/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/page/content/video")
Onward!
Unite the Country

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Afraid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm in this fight because I believe that we can build an America where everyone has value. We can build an America where we put people, not corporations, first. We can build an America that invests... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a2a6/45c30650/1e76ae2f0/66e01986/2820352538/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Donald Trump has been president for 3 years, and there are a lot of people out there who are afraid.

They're afraid for the children who have to go through lockdown drills at school. They're afraid for families separated at the border. They're afraid for women, for people of color, for the LGBTQ+ community, and for anyone who is marginalized under this administration.

It's easy to give into our fear and pull back, but the truth is -- fighting back is an act of patriotism.

We built this nation by fighting back against a king. We saved this nation by fighting the scourge of slavery. We rebuilt this nation's economy by fighting back against the Great Depression with the New Deal. We protected this nation by fighting back against fascism once, and we can do it again.

**This is when Americans are at their best -- by taking on the big battles to fight for their country and their neighbors.**

This is not a time for small ideas. This is a time to fight, and that's exactly what I'll do.

**[I need your voice in this fight-- and with only a few days until Iowa, we need your help more than ever before. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can to help fight for an America that works for working people?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a2a6/45c30650/1e76ae2f0/66e0198b/2820352538/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zSEZfRU9NX0JTQ19FXzIwMjAwMTI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3HF_EOM_BSC_E_20200129_V1S1_P")**

>
I'm in this fight because I believe that we can build an America where everyone has value. We can build an America where we put people, not corporations, first. We can build an America that invests in every child, no matter where they come from or where they live.

I believe in what we can do together. That's why I'm asking you to fight with me, because we can decide the future of this country -- not just for the next four or eight years, but for generations to come.

**This is our moment in history. We can choose hope over fear and fight to make our country work for working people, but I can't do it without you.

[That's why I'm asking for your help. Can you chip in for the first time today to help continue the fight?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a2a6/45c30650/1e76ae2f0/66e0198b/2820352538/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zSEZfRU9NX0JTQ19FXzIwMjAwMTI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3HF_EOM_BSC_E_20200129_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: I'm in this fight because I believe that we can build an America where everyone has value. We can build an America where we put people, not corporations, first. We can build an America that invests... | | | "" Donald Trump has been president for 3 years, and there are a lot of people out there who are afraid. They're afraid for the children who have to go through lockdown drills at school. They're afraid for families separated at the border. They're afraid for women, for people of color, for the LGBTQ+ community, and for anyone who is marginalized under this administration. It's easy to give into our fear and pull back, but the truth is -- fighting back is an act of patriotism. We built this nation by fighting back against a king. We saved this nation by fighting the scourge of slavery. We rebuilt this nation's economy by fighting back against the Great Depression with the New Deal. We protected this nation by fighting back against fascism once, and we can do it again. This is when Americans are at their best -- by taking on the big battles to fight for their country and their neighbors. This is not a time for small ideas. This is a time to fight, and that's exactly what I'll do. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" I'm in this fight because I believe that we can build an America where everyone has value. We can build an America where we put people, not corporations, first. We can build an America that invests in every child, no matter where they come from or where they live. I believe in what we can do together. That's why I'm asking you to fight with me, because we can decide the future of this country -- not just for the next four or eight years, but for generations to come. This is our moment in history. We can choose hope over fear and fight to make our country work for working people, but I can't do it without you. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I took action against Twitter
body:
On Monday, my Congressional campaign filed our complaint with the Federal Election Commission against Twitter for providing corporate, in-kind contributions to my radical opponent, Democrat Lois Frankel.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-362334-848205-4842241-e215a87253-05962c23dd)
Patriot,

On Monday, my Congressional campaign filed our complaint with the Federal Election Commission against Twitter for providing corporate, in-kind contributions to my radical opponent, Democrat Lois Frankel.

What is Twitter doing?

By banning me and other conservative candidates, they’re provided a one-sided benefit to Democrats. And that’s their intent.

While Democrats have screamed “election interference” for years with their Russian Witch Hunt, they gladly accept the benefit of Twitter and other Social Media Giants giving them EXCLUSIVE access to their sites.

But the word’s getting out and I’m building public pressure that will help all Republican candidates on the ballot this year.

Yesterday, I put out a press release about my FEC complaint through a PR service and so far, 73 news outlets have picked up the story and my schedule is BOOKED with interviews!

I’ll tell you about the interviews later this week along with some other great news, but in the meantime, [**can you help cover the costs of blasting out our press release?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-362334-848205-4842241-e215a87253-05962c23dd)

It cost about $1,800 to send our press release and complaint to thousands of news organizations and public influencers.

Here are the results so far:

While it’s expensive to send out the press release, it pays off in “earned media” that would otherwise cost of millions of dollars.

[**Please chip in to help cover our last press blast and the one we have to do on Friday.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-362334-848205-4842241-e215a87253-05962c23dd)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Today I’ll be on the radio in New Jersey (WOND at 2:32 pm), San Diego (KCBQ at 9:35 pm). If you happen to be in those areas, please listen and call in! Thanks again and [**don’t forget to chip in to cover the cost of the press release!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-362334-848205-4842241-e215a87253-05962c23dd)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: BREAKING: Cory Gardner officially announced he's against allowing firsthand witnesses in Trump's impeachment trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Unbelievable, folks -- My opponent, Cory Gardner, just announced he's officially voting **against** allowing firsthand witness testimony in Donald Trump's impeachment trial. Cory Gardner _should_ be doing everything in his power to ensure the American people learn the truth and that the rule of law is upheld. But instead, Gardner is trying to protect Trump, no matter the costs. No one truly independent could possibly think the American people don't deserve to hear from firsthand witnesses. **I 'm outraged. A trial without witnesses and evidence is not a trial at all. It's a sham.** The people of Colorado -- and the entire country -- deserve better. That's why we have to do everything we can to flip the Senate this year, so I'm turning to you: **Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign to defeat Cory Gardner and take back the Senate? subject: About our news

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?refcode=20200129_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)

Team,

Last week we emailed you to let you know that our district is officially a toss-up. And it's because of your continued support that we have been able to completely transform this district.

Together, we closed a 30 point gap and pushed a 6-term incumbent into dropping out of the race. _Together, we transformed this district._

But there's a lot left to do. And ensuring that our ground game has what it takes to win means we need resources.

**[We're $7690 away from hitting our January fundraising goal, and I know that with your help, we can flip this seat.](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?refcode=20200129_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $22](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=20200129_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200129_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200129_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20200129_FR_tossup)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200129_FR_tossup)** This campaign continues to be about reaching out to all our communities, being more inclusive, and fighting for all voters to be heard.

**[Sri doesn't accept corporate PAC money because he knows he serves voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests, so we need your support, team, to finish out January strong.](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?refcode=20200129_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**

It's because of your support, your generosity, and your help that our grassroots effort got as far as it did in 2018. This time, we're going further.

Thank you so much for your support,

Rocky Saligram
Political Director | | **[CHIP IN ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/JILPNdFOz8RYJLoCZKHSYX-meqewtLAf72b_tihQNv4=/XDqW4ObrLC7lC86BbsK2gQUVoAEr3ovM_Hf4i6pC24U=?refcode=20200129_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**

subject: You didn't make a donation last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6610%2E377263%2EAdUMJN) Yang Gang --

Urgent: It looks like you didn't make a donation last night. We need to capture the momentum from this surge, but fundraising today leaves us way behind our goal.

[Can you donate $10 or more immediately?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23967?t=6&akid=6610%2E377263%2EAdUMJN)

Yang2020 HQ

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Andrew Yang for President
Date: Tues, Jan. 28, 2020 at 9:18 PM
Subject: An urgent request for you to make a contribution with our campaign on the rise

| | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=2&akid=6610%2E377263%2EAdUMJN) Yang Gang --

We’re going to be extremely blunt here -- we’re writing to ask you to make your first contribution tonight.

Make no mistake: We have a big opportunity here to win this nomination by surprising the establishment and media in the early states with our finish.

**A new poll from Morning Consult of all early states (IA, NH, NV, SC) has us at 8%. Our highest ever in their polling -- surging 3 points in the last week.**

We are peaking at the right time, and no one is going to see us coming.

But we could absolutely lose every ounce of our momentum if we fall short of this goal before our FEC deadline Friday night. Every dollar of our goal is necessary to continue rising in Iowa, New Hampshire, and beyond.

Since you’ve been holding back, we’re coming to you now when it’s most urgent:

body:

| Team, there's some good news and some bad news:

[The Good News:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab17/134673f2/37897cbd/699753f5/4143731780/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_012920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") Polls out of Iowa and New Hampshire show that our momentum is growing!!

[The Bad News:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab17/134673f2/37897cbd/699753f5/4143731780/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_012920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") Over the last 48 hours, the pace of donations has slowed significantly, and if we don't hustle, we'll risk coming up short at the most crucial moment in this campaign!

We need to raise another $45,000 by MIDNIGHT Friday or we won't be able to keep running TV ads, reaching out to undecided voters on the ground, and holding town halls.

[It's crucial that we keep our fundraising strong as we move to persuade the more than half of voters who are undecided and will make up their minds this week.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab17/134673f2/37897cbd/699753f5/4143731780/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_012920_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

subject: Based on these numbers, Trump could win in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Hi Peter, A recent _Washington Post_ -ABC News poll found that 56% of Americans approve of Trump's handling of the economy, up 10% from September \-- that's the highest it's been throughout his presidency. Economic approval is a key indicator of success for presidential re-election, and with his job approval rating up to 44% despite the impeachment proceedings, Trump stands a good chance of winning in November. name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Hello, DFLer
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
Friend\--

I'm Melissa Hortman, Speaker of the House. I've represented residents in the Northwest Metro for the last 14 years, and in that time I've seen DFLers in the House accomplish a lot for Minnesotans.

Members of the Minnesota House DFL are working to make our state work better for everyone in Minnesota. We will continue to work to ensure that every Minnesotan has access to excellent education, good-paying jobs, and affordable and accessible health care.

To accomplish all these goals and create a Minnesota that works better for everyone, DFLers need to secure our position in the majority by promoting the positive progress we're making for all Minnesotans.

That's why I'm writing today, Friend.

We need your help to get the word out about the work we're doing, Friend. Can you start **today** by following us on social media for important updates about our work?

[**Like us on Facebook »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lX-QWH-kkliT2SViN3nXUWci5iNlzL0A5QdFIeEgnyc=/SGtzky6rRSarB5z84D7SXvxRs1XUxCQh3N7zBRBWlLk=)

[**Follow us on Twitter »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lX-QWH-kkliT2SViN3nXUWci5iNlzL0A5QdFIeEgnyc=/wXkfArNHxx0RAwzxF77wcu1tLLkSrSZC4zdrCWd4PA8=)

Our DFL representatives are busy at the Capitol promoting the values we share as Minnesotans and look forward to bringing positive change to their districts. **Follow us on**[ **Facebook**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lX-QWH-kkliT2SViN3nXUWci5iNlzL0A5QdFIeEgnyc=/SGtzky6rRSarB5z84D7SXvxRs1XUxCQh3N7zBRBWlLk=)**and**[ **Twitter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lX-QWH-kkliT2SViN3nXUWci5iNlzL0A5QdFIeEgnyc=/wXkfArNHxx0RAwzxF77wcu1tLLkSrSZC4zdrCWd4PA8=)**now, and let 's get to work.**

Thanks,

Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House

[**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lX-QWH-kkliT2SViN3nXUWci5iNlzL0A5QdFIeEgnyc=/Cjx9gUbrzFw0PLtvsBrTYd9y5T4VIHtUFou5GX0RDns=)

Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.

How's about you toss in $10 before the end-of-month deadline in 48 hours to get the job done for Democrats? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200129_em_fr_b2_carville_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") Here's the deal: \-- McConnell could lose his seat -- and his whole freaking majority \-- Even _Fox News_ admits Mitch McConnell's approval is TANKING \-- But Democrats' chances are ZERO to defeat McConnell's Senate if we don't win New Mexico If we want to defeat McConnell's Senate, we MUST give Ben Ray our money NOW! He's got a gap to fill and 48 hours until the deadline to do it. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b70b/18e32a7f/51780cd2/7b227a16/937556265/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. name: Team Hunt
subject: Breaking: Michael Berry Endorses Wesley Hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Says Washington Needs More Outsiders Like Hunt
**_Michael Berry endorses Wesley Hunt_**
**_Says Washington Needs More Outsiders Like Hunt_**

**Houston, TX** – Today former Houston City Councilman and popular conservative radio host Michael Berry endorsed Republican Wesley Hunt in the 7th Congressional District:

“Wesley Hunt is a warrior and patriot. He’s put his life on the line for the freedom that we enjoy every day,” said Berry. “He’s also a conservative who won’t be afraid to confront the liberals in Congress who target President Trump and conservatives across the country on a daily basis. We need soldiers like Wesley in Congress. That’s why I’m endorsing Wesley in the 7th Congressional District.”

Berry joins fellow conservative leaders in Harris County such as Senator Ted Cruz, former Congressman Ted Poe and Harris County Commissioners Steve Radack and Jack Cagle in endorsing Hunt.

Hunt is a Houston native, West Point graduate, and former Apache Helicopter Pilot who flew 55 combat missions in Iraq.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=1f55c6ff37e04f53aacf3deaf18171b5&_e=l3pYe1MPVfOrRg_RUKIVDZgctpQRE0_LppZJzzg8K39ckQBNvzG1k3Evj9hPanFcSuTmIKOxa2_3zqwo411MO8hj9Pvf9j_iOrJVkfOdVqp4e4VNmyXtgJ_zUMnbjc3jq1GooYJ3L9zXq3UKPTTvc-DFY5F0V-iF3xpNkKdd-DYRfRZBXDmpe1MnULitcHe4myq_Us9YyRK_Zs4j2lixaeGa7QfHNy55LliSAzvcn02VZ25NnWCHGbTcX0XjRJRwP--hAOjPoQWuDSiM70URsEC-3UPZe4_ZE2cEEqPFZ-0%3D)****

name: Kathy Manning
subject: This is personal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Our healthcare system is failing us.
|
---

| | For me, access to affordable healthcare isn't a talking point. It's personal. When my youngest daughter was diagnosed with a chronic illness, our insurance company refused to cover the medication she needed and said it would cost us $10,000 per month out of pocket. Unfortunately, my experience is not the exception to the rule. Our healthcare system is failing us, and we need to fix it. That's exactly what I plan to do in Congress, but I need your help. [_**Will you chip in to our campaign before the end-of-month deadline to put us in the strongest possible position to win?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d38b/3d199a51/2f0c84d7/7364eee6/4009595298/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDEyOSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200129?refcode=kme200129_nd_other&refcode2=17426") On the campaign trail, I've met countless North Carolinians who have had similar experiences to mine. I've heard from grandmothers who are forced to decide whether to pay for their heart medication or to put food on the table. I've met mothers who forgo their own medication in order to be able to pay for their children's medication. [_**I 'm fighting to make healthcare more affordable and to lower the astronomical cost of life-saving prescription drugs, but I'm relying on your support to overcome the odds. Please -- chip in before the end-of-month deadline.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d38b/3d199a51/2f0c84d7/7364eee6/4009595298/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDEyOSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200129?refcode=kme200129_nd_other&refcode2=17426") Thank you, Kathy | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d38b/3d199a51/2f0c84d7/7364eee6/4009595298/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDEyOSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200129?refcode=kme200129_nd_other&refcode2=17426")

Yang Gang --

**Here’s the good news:** We’ve seen Andrew rise in the polls this week, with significant gains in the early states -- and his favorability is topping the competition.

**Here’s the not-so-good news:** We only have two days left, and right now we’re still really short of reaching our $3 million FEC goal. Honestly, we might not hit it.

It’s really important that we hit this goal. We need to be able to fully fund our bus tour across Iowa and keep our ads on in the early states this close to the first caucus.

If we don’t, we’ll need to cut back at the worst possible moment -- and at this point in the race, we can’t afford to cut the brakes on our momentum.

**If every person reading this email chips in $5 or more right now, we’ll easily hit $3 million.

[Andrew doesn’t have tons of wealthy donors -- so only you can help us reach our goal. Yang Gang, chip in what you can before the clock runs out in TWO days.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23982?t=13&akid=6617%2E377263%2E2SWbI_)**

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: Here's what Senate Republicans had to say after leaving a closed door meeting yesterday:
body:
Really? They've "heard enough?"
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef1/4bef7a87/6a9e80f9/287fb491/1647927410/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends --
Here's what Senate Republicans had to say after leaving a closed door meeting on Capitol Hill yesterday:
_" The consensus is: That we've heard enough. And it's time to go to a final judgment vote."_
Really? They've "heard enough?"
They haven't called a single witness! They haven't heard from Mick Mulvaney or John Bolton -- in fact, every single Republican Senator voted AGAINST hearing them testify.
**Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans aren 't trying to get all the facts or be transparent with the American people, and that's not right.**
**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign now. If we can defeat Susan Collins, we will take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef1/4bef7a87/6a9e80f9/287fb490/1647927410/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200129-2-full")**
The truth is, things won't change in Washington until we kick Mitch McConnell out as Majority Leader -- and that won't happen unless we win in Maine.
So thanks for your fight,
Team Sara

name: Warren 2020
subject: There are only 5 days until the Iowa caucus and we wanted to give you an update about what we're hearing on the ground:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
With our comprehensive organizing, advertising, and voting outreach plan, we're reaching out to caucus-goers in Iowa and voters across the country to show them Elizabeth's vision for America. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a2b1/45c30650/1e749c5a2/66e0359f/2223731442/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
There are only **5 days** until the Iowa caucus and we wanted to give you an update about what we're hearing on the ground:

Our organizers and volunteers are still talking with Iowans who haven't decided who they are supporting. The connections we're making _every day_ -- even with just 5 days left -- are making a powerfully important difference. But time is running short, and we only have a few more days to bring as many Iowa caucus-goers as possible into this fight for big, structural change.

We have a plan to do that -- and that's why we set a goal of $3.5 million before midnight Friday. Because that's what it's going to take to run the strongest program possible before the Iowa caucuses. **But we're halfway through the week, and we're not halfway to our goal -- and we need your help.**

**[You have the power to help persuade someone in Iowa to support Elizabeth by making a contribution right now! Chip in $2 or whatever you can for the first time today to help reach our goal and connect with caucus-goers in this final stretch.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a2b1/45c30650/1e749c5a2/66e03581/2223731442/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zR0ZfRU9NX0dSTV9XXzIwMjAwMTI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3GF_EOM_GRM_W_20200129_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

| | | Today is Kansas' 159th birthday. Suzanne and I would like to wish you all a Happy Kansas Day! _**It's because of people like you that Kansas is such a great place to live, work, and raise our family. **_

William Allen White said it best, "When anything is going to happen in this country, it happens first in Kansas."

Thank you for all of your support over the past year!
Yours in the fight,
Jake LaTurner

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: PROMISE KEPT: President Trump signs USMCA—NAFTA is gone!
body:
President Trump made history today, keeping his signature promise to end the job-killing NAFTA era. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99ee30ed6d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 29, 2020
---
| | |
# **PROMISE KEPT: President Trump signs USMCA—NAFTA is gone!**

**President Trump made history** today, signing the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA) and keeping his signature promise to end the NAFTA era.

**President Trump:** [For decades, Washington kept letting you down](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5372601d1&e=3ee4985eea)

**Repairing broken trade deals** was a key agenda item that separated then-candidate Donald J. Trump from his political opponents. Washington pundits and “experts” were skeptical, as always: Both Republican and Democrat politicians for years had been promising voters that they’d scrap NAFTA for a stronger deal.

**But President Trump** is anything but a conventional, career politician.

**“Everybody said** that this was a deal that could not be done. Too complicated, too big—couldn’t be done,” the President said today from the South Lawn of the White House. “We got it done.”

**USMCA’s improvements** over NAFTA are significant. The new agreement “is the largest, fairest, most balanced, and modern trade agreement ever achieved,” President Trump says. Here is just a sampling of the biggest changes:
* _Broad economic benefits_**.** USMCA is estimated to create nearly 600,000 American jobs—and generate up to $235 billion in economic activity.

* _Better protection for workers_**.** It has the strongest, most advanced, and most comprehensive labor protections of any American trade agreement in history.

* _Support for our farmers_**.** The agreement is a massive win for American farmers and ranchers, vastly improving access to Canadian and Mexican markets. U.S. agricultural exports are expected to increase by $2.2 billion under the deal.

* _A boost for American manufacturers_**.** The U.S. auto industry alone expects to create up to 76,000 new jobs and spur $34 billion in new investments.

* _Modernized terms._ Unlike NAFTA, USMCA has protections for American intellectual property, a first-of-its-kind chapter on digital trade, and provisions to crack down on unfair currency practices.

**“Two decades of politicians** ran for office vowing to replace the NAFTA,” the President added. “Yet once elected, they never even tried. They never even gave it a shot. They sold out. But I’m not like those other politicians . . . I keep my promises and I’m fighting for the American worker.”

[“Trump heading back to Michigan to celebrate trade deal with Mexico, Canada”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d29ca91e36&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump:** [USMCA adds to America’s blue-collar BOOM!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7988add3a7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **The witch hunt never ends**

**They say it takes 10,000 hours** to become an expert at something. If that’s true, then give credit where it’s due: House Democrats and their media allies have put in the hours—and then some.

**Sadly, it’s not** time spent on any useful skill or on a policy agenda for working Americans. Instead, it’s a 3-year obsession with doing anything possible to get rid of President Trump.

**OOPS:**[Schiff hypothetical exposes Dem hypocrisy on investigations](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d24c8764cf&e=3ee4985eea)

**The split screen** in Washington today put a spotlight on the problem. On one side, President Trump stood next to a crowd of blue-collar workers as he signed a trade deal to replace the job-killing NAFTA. On the other, Democrats in Congress continued to waste the American people’s time and money with a never-ending partisan impeachment.

**Each time** a hoax looks to finally be dead—whether it be the Russia collusion myth or the Ukraine sham investigation—Democrats conjure up some new allegation or distraction. When Speaker Nancy Pelosi first announced a Ukraine impeachment probe _before_ any actual investigation, the focus was on President Trump’s July 25 phone call. Then President Trump released the transcript and told Americans to read it for themselves. Democrats weren’t prepared for that level of transparency.

**Democrats probably didn’t** count on [Ukrainian President Zelenskyy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e62c1b717&e=3ee4985eea) refuting their claims, either. So Pelosi, Rep. Adam Schiff, and other top Democrats tried out a variety of new narratives, ranging from the “whistleblower” that Schiff lied about coordinating with to various made-up claims of extortion and bribery.

**Imagine if Democrats** had put politics second and the American people first. There’s no limit to what our country could achieve—more middle-class tax cuts, much-needed reforms to immigration, further reductions in prescription drug prices, infrastructure upgrades, and more. America today is thriving. Democrats should join us and keep it going.

**🎬** **Watch:** [The most revealing Adam Schiff moment](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53cb9b6e0d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

clean_body: President Trump made history today, keeping his signature promise to end the job-killing NAFTA era. | | | | | The White House • January 29, 2020 | | | PROMISE KEPT: President Trump signs USMCA—NAFTA is gone! President Trump made history today, signing the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA) and keeping his signature promise to end the NAFTA era. President Trump: Repairing broken trade deals was a key agenda item that separated then-candidate Donald J. Trump from his political opponents. Washington pundits and “experts” were skeptical, as always: Both Republican and Democrat politicians for years had been promising voters that they’d scrap NAFTA for a stronger deal. But President Trump is anything but a conventional, career politician. “Everybody said that this was a deal that could not be done. Too complicated, too big—couldn’t be done,” the President said today from the South Lawn of the White House. “We got it done.” USMCA’s improvements over NAFTA are significant. The new agreement “is the largest, fairest, most balanced, and modern trade agreement ever achieved,” President Trump says. Here is just a sampling of the biggest changes: Broad economic benefits. USMCA is estimated to create nearly 600,000 American jobs—and generate up to $235 billion in economic activity. Better protection for workers. It has the strongest, most advanced, and most comprehensive labor protections of any American trade agreement in history. Support for our farmers. The agreement is a massive win for American farmers and ranchers, vastly improving access to Canadian and Mexican markets. U.S. agricultural exports are expected to increase by $2.2 billion under the deal. A boost for American manufacturers. The U.S. auto industry alone expects to create up to 76,000 new jobs and spur $34 billion in new investments. Modernized terms. Unlike NAFTA, USMCA has protections for American intellectual property, a first-of-its-kind chapter on digital trade, and provisions to crack down on unfair currency practices. “Two decades of politicians ran for office vowing to replace the NAFTA,” the President added. “Yet once elected, they never even tried. They never even gave it a shot. They sold out. But I’m not like those other politicians . . . I keep my promises and I’m fighting for the American worker.” President Trump: | | The witch hunt never ends They say it takes 10,000 hours to become an expert at something. If that’s true, then give credit where it’s due: House Democrats and their media allies have put in the hours—and then some. Sadly, it’s not time spent on any useful skill or on a policy agenda for working Americans. Instead, it’s a 3-year obsession with doing anything possible to get rid of President Trump. OOPS: The split screen in Washington today put a spotlight on the problem. On one side, President Trump stood next to a crowd of blue-collar workers as he signed a trade deal to replace the job-killing NAFTA. On the other, Democrats in Congress continued to waste the American people’s time and money with a never-ending partisan impeachment. Each time a hoax looks to finally be dead—whether it be the Russia collusion myth or the Ukraine sham investigation—Democrats conjure up some new allegation or distraction. When Speaker Nancy Pelosi first announced a Ukraine impeachment probe before any actual investigation, the focus was on President Trump’s July 25 phone call. Then President Trump released the transcript and told Americans to read it for themselves. Democrats weren’t prepared for that level of transparency. Democrats probably didn’t count on refuting their claims, either. So Pelosi, Rep. Adam Schiff, and other top Democrats tried out a variety of new narratives, ranging from the “whistleblower” that Schiff lied about coordinating with to various made-up claims of extortion and bribery. Imagine if Democrats had put politics second and the American people first. There’s no limit to what our country could achieve—more middle-class tax cuts, much-needed reforms to immigration, further reductions in prescription drug prices, infrastructure upgrades, and more. America today is thriving. Democrats should join us and keep it going. 🎬 Watch: | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen | President Trump signs the United States-Mexico-Canada Trade Agreement | January 29, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 USA · 202-456-1111

With Super Bowl Sunday on the horizon, Eric wanted to share some of the--but certainly not all-- the best places to watch football in Indiana! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a28f6868c4e74df18bc7372639ae5f95&_e=jPcmC7lGX4MHUtYi4EYuSkyDgt_Z8dIe6dGPngL3Uv-EsU3CenmCLe7uziqUjCQdCKFWr5IkP-sCCrdp-7--7AaNCmrOPPIgRSkWfzNtymWZib5MjnPfWJYW25ou2TV3Wh3RKRfzNOVOAq_k8ttqPgjaqFq_OlEYorvhxLiD9rfdeQyAWFDIdKrkORJw_A-dQRmF2f5G0HiYSUT1SkO2VnR-DFFP7H7SiyC3Jhrs0UsYHDCNUoHhpUgsgT_UcMhHIkKIV3DdPSuAImD17s2sYgZurmHqCAZTK_rksF1RzCt9i36BUMSKEIKjLzA-xPpLhFZQo9zWS4y5gCCUjmBBk22L6JamJwqmwWLhgHv5C3n4OqEYzfvjNCeYEWoNDYU4dceW8VOhfheo8MufxRKi9PLkiiCQpE_0BSVR5tXrcy8%3D) Friend,

With Super Bowl Sunday on the horizon, Eric thought it would be fun for this week’s Holcomb’s **One Indiana** to focus on the gridiron. Eric loves football and is excited to watch the Big Game this Sunday with family and friends (even though the Colts aren’t playing).
**That’s why Governor Holcomb sat down and made a list of his favorite places to catch a football game in Indiana! Check out his list below and let us know if there’s a stadium he missed! ** [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a28f6868c4e74df18bc7372639ae5f95&_e=jPcmC7lGX4MHUtYi4EYuSkyDgt_Z8dIe6dGPngL3Uv-EsU3CenmCLe7uziqUjCQdCKFWr5IkP-sCCrdp-7--7AaNCmrOPPIgRSkWfzNtymWZib5MjnPfWJYW25ou2TV3Wh3RKRfzNOVOAq_k8ttqPgjaqFq_OlEYorvhxLiD9rfdeQyAWFDIdKrkORJw_A-dQRmF2f5G0HiYSUT1SkO2VlnPzAem4Cy2qt9iirQ6v_Z7h1WzT1YmCI-lbeVa8kNfw7DB7dSCPeVTwZHcqfbc_oXjSr1Ix3Yu3rfkCvBs7pkqI9DPVnGo9eB8Z11drkoaO8_S3L7EzE9VpZy7fy5PQHewfC-p8sMofnsHAeVJ1KBcYmkp63GMGfgnQlFPd_r3bHMlt2o54GVvqZIW_iP974xXt0L-hFi-N-ByfHGFFS8%3D)
* Blackstock Stadium - DePauw University, home of the Tigers

* Lucas Oil Stadium - Home of the Indianapolis Colts!

* Memorial Stadium - Indiana University... Defend the Rock!

* Notre Dame Stadium

* Pike High School - Eric is a proud homer!

* Alumni Stadium - Hanover College—see above
* Ross-Aide Stadium - Boiler Up!

* Wabash College
* Inman Field - Lincoln High School, Vincennes
* High Schools - too many more to name!

_What’s your favorite place to watch football in Indiana? Let us know — maybe we’ll add an extra stop to the campaign trail this fall!_ **Flash Survey** **Q: Where's your favorite place to watch football?** [ **Tell us** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a28f6868c4e74df18bc7372639ae5f95&_e=jPcmC7lGX4MHUtYi4EYuSkyDgt_Z8dIe6dGPngL3Uv-EsU3CenmCLe7uziqUjCQdCKFWr5IkP-sCCrdp-7--7AaNCmrOPPIgRSkWfzNtymWZib5MjnPfWJYW25ou2TV3Wh3RKRfzNOVOAq_k8ttqPgjaqFq_OlEYorvhxLiD9rfdeQyAWFDIdKrkORJw_A-dQRmF2f5G0HiYSUT1SkO2VlV1Ly6iCAlEC0VAYY19wXJ2CRlFpN5WMDdRiutOJAdnmiCWDqDE67Sp8MzhIM0bDgsfvwZQmkvfv3vEhGYfSOojt-r83j-enWSomW5pNHuXdweinbVQ02ZX0zbb5ltQsVDAlfabYLeOrf-tuJSweAtL8vh8H77cN-_DApJO1ZNvoHGaigsshEPNMNNuuS5WUk3SjKKMqoTA-_Zts31XnAA%3D) Thanks,
-Holcomb Crew |

Dear supporters, This week I was so proud to release our[ new foreign policy platform to End the Forever Wars.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IQE/ni0YAA/t.2yt/yYUoKFVYS2WT9J2gHP4e7Q/h2/t9r2ZyovdL2-2B6yN34a0has-2BtT-2FNrA1jESTu44Yh04EwfTwkNOLNeG3ksSGU-2BD3B3k3Gr1ecTD-2F9ZqIsgEjPn8Iec3-2F-2FWEIqhl4yTEygYh5OF3q-2Fi1h9rvDZq44bfSU1bktuLDSW3VZDM9cwW6IQqSoKyYPErk1mWf4Y3jRqtuAEobcR-2Fx1HvJhgwWB-2F48DHj4o0FZwG-2B2btuiYckOzeXHb-2BRz6ZVX3wMXCoG8UVG8oOfuu-2FOhWIBRFa4-2BaqnybBrsI-2BX-2Fc-2Fg5uS8KnOJF083qFVyUCZnSIYQdCuQFFIgZaP-2BIvkz6UnKnP6daN6WFe9Ji-2BjgGllRCdEocK1Ui6Rg3A-3D-3D/x9Ua) This platform was developed by the members of our Veterans roundtable, with input from leaders in our vibrant local anti-war movement. Unlike the incumbent, our campaign takes $0 from the defense contractors and weapons makers who profit from war. We will lead in the movement to stop war with Iran. And when in Congress, we will work to end the forever wars that have defined and decimated my generation. Our vision is to build the most powerful peace movement the world has ever seen, to transform US foreign policy away from defending fossil fuels and protecting corporate profits, to defending human rights and protecting our global climate. We can do this. Our kids are counting on us. Onward, Doyle

[The Register-Guard ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IQE/ni0YAA/t.2yt/yYUoKFVYS2WT9J2gHP4e7Q/h7/3r-2B9H4kRwZGWVwt8Jac9QlvG9GxBfRmb5QVzQCa5hHOC8C9GjbWH7F8dvyyCEa7WA6bsBAr4qEcDpssEdH4TyVR9PKAbIaV4Y-2FZ4xxdGh1L3sDUyqzJkiy2pw9ZJ3C6EFCYCteZ4fRFiNJ418YNvEPN7-2BR6OgZM7RH0yXpo-2FXyAjPqz-2BF2I38ZAFgWq3ESN9A0ibyJQoO4nRfCAHd8fw3QHg0sd8XnQGFDrDwqQICcFh0K0vPsartWXtwo8C-2BKjH6PY6Yf2OjsJJA4tSpSlhlTKtrev1RBS84zO0Z0QO3szSHYuIOspBuVIYRiiQlK9fkYZddYTBV3-2FuNZwwZNdLuJp7kJQGSdWPUQrasFshi0U5lOkZYHP6KD8YGdCUzzmf-2FEsjswhDtcwCxjZkUNolw3-2BStgjbknzWUqg3WkdAWDhoVxLv8suNlZkX7pFbQx6K97DxZJJLoZyuNuQypw46ww-3D-3D/L6wJ) **The Climate Leader My Generation Badly Needs** Canning understands that climate change is not just an environmental issue, but also a social and an economic justice issue as well. She understands that the Green New Deal is about changing the lives of working people in our district and across the country. It is about ensuring a just transition for workers in polluting industries and historically marginalized communities. She understands that the climate crisis is not 30 years away, but, in fact, already impacting Oregonians, from droughts destroying our crops to wildfires threatening our lives. Because of her proven track record, we can trust Canning to hold on to these convictions for economic, racial and climate justice throughout her campaign and once she is in Washington. In the face of this looming disaster, it is more important than ever to elect a candidate who has proven themselves, time and time again, to be an uncompromising advocate of working people. Our movement knows that the coming years will be critical to our fight for a stable climate and an equitable future for all Oregonians and all Americans. That is why the Sunrise Eugene and Corvallis chapters stand behind Canning in her effort to lead Oregon into the decade of the Green New Deal. Our futures depend upon leaders like her doing everything in their power to fight for climate action..."

Check out the coverage of our new foreign policy platform by. | Dear supporters, This week I was so proud to release our This platform was developed by the members of our Veterans roundtable, with input from leaders in our vibrant local anti-war movement. Unlike the incumbent, our campaign takes $0 from the defense contractors and weapons makers who profit from war. We will lead in the movement to stop war with Iran. And when in Congress, we will work to end the forever wars that have defined and decimated my generation. Our vision is to build the most powerful peace movement the world has ever seen, to transform US foreign policy away from defending fossil fuels and protecting corporate profits, to defending human rights and protecting our global climate. We can do this. Our kids are counting on us. Onward, Doyle | | | IN THE NEWS... Canning Wins Our Vote "Throughout her decades-long career as a community organizer, Canning has shown that she understands the gravity of the climate crisis and the urgency with which we must act to address it. She has stood with us in the fight for our futures, and we have no doubt that she will continue that fight in Washington, D.C. With Doyle's leadership and a movement of young people behind her, her district can lead the fight for a stable climate and a more equitable future." Concerns Over Possible U.S. War With Iran Linger In Eugene Democrat Doyle Canning was also present. Canning released her anti-war platform that included ending military draft registration and cutting the defense budget. "This platform is not just about stopping Tump's latest escalation of war with Iran, but about the ending the forever wars, exposing U.S. backed interference abroad and taking a stand against the military industrial complex," Canning said. The Climate Leader My Generation Badly Needs Canning understands that climate change is not just an environmental issue, but also a social and an economic justice issue as well. She understands that the Green New Deal is about changing the lives of working people in our district and across the country. It is about ensuring a just transition for workers in polluting industries and historically marginalized communities. She understands that the climate crisis is not 30 years away, but, in fact, already impacting Oregonians, from droughts destroying our crops to wildfires threatening our lives. Because of her proven track record, we can trust Canning to hold on to these convictions for economic, racial and climate justice throughout her campaign and once she is in Washington. In the face of this looming disaster, it is more important than ever to elect a candidate who has proven themselves, time and time again, to be an uncompromising advocate of working people. Our movement knows that the coming years will be critical to our fight for a stable climate and an equitable future for all Oregonians and all Americans. That is why the Sunrise Eugene and Corvallis chapters stand behind Canning in her effort to lead Oregon into the decade of the Green New Deal. Our futures depend upon leaders like her doing everything in their power to fight for climate action..." Stoking DeFazio's Fire "DeFazio's attendance was a calculated move since he intends to run for reelection in the 2020 primaries. DeFazio is facing a new challenge this year: an opponent from his own party who's 33 years his junior. Doyle Canning, a two-decade-long progressive activist, is railing against DeFazios' comfortable tenure...DeFazio is as groomed as any seasoned politician is apt to be. However, the attendees were not forgiving with their questions. They made it clear that they were not going to idly sit by for his question-dodging and story-telling tangents. As the interview proceeded, more direct and hard-hitting questions were being asked."... | ANNOUNCEMENTS | ORAN MOR ARTISAN MEAD: SAT. FEB. 1 Join us in Roseburg for a fundraiser at the Meadery!
